module.name: pinstore
module.spec: FilePinStore.Load reads .driftpin/state.xml from disk, unmarshals XML into Specs, Markers, Links, and ResolutionState, and returns the PinState. If the file does not exist, it returns ErrPinNotFound.

FilePinStore.Save marshals PinState to indented XML and writes it to .driftpin/state.xml, truncating any existing file. It also ensures .driftpin/baselines/ exists. The XML root element is drift with nested specs, markers, links, and resolutions sections.
When .driftpin/state.xml does not exist on disk, Load returns ErrPinNotFound, prompting the user to run drift init first.

BaselineStore manages content-addressed baseline files in .driftpin/baselines/. Each file is named by its SHA1 hash (sha1(content)==filename). Write stores content at <hash> if absent (dedup) and verifies sha1(content)==hash. Read returns content for <hash> or false if missing. Delete removes a single file. Missing files are not errors.
